causal_question: What is the causal effect of a proposed wind turbine being located within 3 km of a precinct (prop_3km) on the change in the provincial Liberal Party's vote share between 2007 and 2011 (chng_lib), estimated for comparable precincts in the 2011 matched sample?
vague_question: Did having a proposed wind turbine nearby (within 3 km) cause a precinct to reduce its support for the incumbent provincial Liberal Party between 2007 and 2011? Estimate the average effect among similar precincts.
